title: Karjat Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Karjat, with a Z-Score of +5.34. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Karjat is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 17.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 38%, and the wind speed is moderate at 15.1 km/h. 
 The impact of this heat wave will be significant, with no heating degree days (HDD) recorded, indicating no need for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
